company.name: iFeX International
company.heroHeadline: Engineering Intelligent Digital Solutions for Modern Businesses
company.heroSubtext: iFeX International builds premium websites, ERP systems, mobile apps, and applied AI automation — engineered for performance, security, and scale at every stage of growth.
company.mission: To Deliver Secure, Scalable, and Innovative Technology Solutions.
company.vision: A world where every ambitious company has access to great engineering.

portfolio.title: Developed the Mobile Application for SlipX
portfolio.summary: Developed the **SlipX Mobile Application** for **slipx.online**, replicating the web platform's interface and features. The app enables secure payment slip verification, fraud detection, and includes **full Admin Panel access** for managing users and verification activities directly from mobile.

portfolio.title: Modern ERP for Ishan Motors
portfolio.summary: Developed a custom ERP System for Ishan Motors from the ground up to manage inventory, invoicing, customers, sales, and daily business operations. The system features a modern Light & Dark interface, real-time dashboard, advanced reporting, responsive design, and secure user management, providing a scalable and efficient solution for streamlining business workflows.

portfolio.title: Fully Customized  Business Website for Ishan Motors
portfolio.summary: Implemented A modern 5-page business website for Ishan Motors featuring Dark & Light modes, English, Sinhala & Tamil language support, and a digital contact card. Built for speed, responsiveness, and a seamless user experience.
